rationale.R1.1: The artifact asserts multiple load-bearing contribution claims — unconditional A-stability across full stiffness range, O(h^3) order, adaptive online partitioning — that a review must reconstruct and evaluate for coherence and accuracy.
rationale.R1.2: Explicit mathematical claims are present (amplification factor bound |R(z)| ≤ 1 iff h|λ| ≤ 2, order proof under regularity assumptions, SDIRK + ERK corrector reconciliation) and their internal logical consistency is squarely in scope for any technical review of this artifact.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative experimental claims (4–7× speedup over ARK4 at matched accuracy, preservation of unconditional-stability guarantee on three named benchmarks) require checking that stated conclusions are grounded in reported results and that the comparison baseline is fairly characterized.

parsed.clarification_question: Is the primary goal of this review technical correctness — checking mathematical claims, stability analysis, and experimental support — rather than (or instead of) editorial quality such as prose clarity, sentence structure, and writing style?
